items.title: “The economy affects us through food prices and fuel prices. The times are hard on us. These are serious implications because we do not have access to commodities,”
“It’s clear that it is trampling on and violating many of the articles of that association agreement, especially those related to respect for international law and humanitarian law,”
“It was frustrating to get it back to even, have a couple of par 5s in front of me, and then not do many things I felt wrong and wasn't able to convert basically anything coming down the stretch,”
